executionPosture.note: The desktop app stays in wrapper role and bundles its sidecar inputs under src-tauri/binaries.

notes: The desktop repo now pins exact upstream release refs and must run npm run record:release-sidecar-checksums before shipping real sidecars.
The GUI must call FFHN, not HTMLCUT, during normal operation.
FFHN remains responsible for invoking HTMLCUT.
Committed sidecar stand-ins are development scaffolding, not release proof.
